name: kobe-monorepo
description: Monorepo for kobe (TUI orchestrator for Claude Code) + branding (Remotion render pipeline).

scripts.daemon: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/cli/index.ts daemon start
scripts.daemon:stop: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/cli/index.ts daemon stop
scripts.daemon:restart: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/cli/index.ts daemon restart
scripts.daemon:status: cd packages/kobe && bun run src/cli/index.ts daemon status
scripts.lint: biome check biome.json package.json docs packages/kobe packages/kobe-daemon --config-path ./biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check biome.json package.json docs packages/kobe packages/kobe-daemon --config-path ./biome.json --write
